title: 'Will Selectively Remove Infiltrators': Amit Shah Promises in Assam; Warns of 'Shootings', 'Bomb Blasts' During Congress Rule
description: "In these ten years, we have stopped the infiltrators; no infiltrator can enter Assam now. These infiltrators are taking jobs from our young people in Assam. They have no rights on this land," Union Home Minister Amit Shah said.
